understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to navigate from the starting position to the goal gem (+), using horizontal movement and gravity-falling after each move, while avoiding hazards such as spikes and utilizing clicks to remove breakable blocks when necessary.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is limited to horizontal actions (MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT), after which gravity automatically moves the player in its current direction until landing on a solid tile, hazard, or goal. CLICK is used to remove breakable tiles that block progress. Undo reverts the previous action. Each move or click advances the turn count, but only horizontal moves advance the rising platform timer when present. Careful planning is needed to navigate passages and avoid hazardous tiles.
